content.description: Assistant's text response. Empty string if the model returned no text (rare; some providers return empty content with a non-stop finishReason).

totalTokens.description: Optional — hosts MAY compute as inputTokens + outputTokens, OR return the provider's distinct value (some providers track cached prefix tokens separately).

finishReason.description: Canonical finish reasons. `stop` = natural completion. `length` = maxTokens hit. `content-filter` = provider-side content moderation. `tool-call` = model returned a tool-call (unusual for this node — typically structured-output handles it). `other` = unmapped.

model.description: Provider-reported actual model that served the request. MAY differ from `config.model` when the provider auto-routes (e.g., `claude-sonnet-latest` resolves to a versioned id).
